subject: A helmeted soldier in red and gold armor charging forward with a raised sword, wearing a dark starry cape patterned with constellations, framed by classical stone columns and ruins
description: A heroic warrior charges forward mid-stride, sword raised overhead in a striking pose. The figure wears a plumed Greek-style helmet with a dark crest and ornate red-and-gold cuirass with shoulder pauldrons. A flowing cape trails behind, painted with the dark blue starfield and constellations characteristic of Theros's Nyx motif. Behind the soldier rise weathered classical columns and stone architecture in warm tan and ochre tones, suggesting an ancient Greek temple or ruin. The lighting is bright daylight with warm highlights on the armor and a clear sky overhead. Composition is dynamic and action-forward, with the figure facing forward-left toward the viewer.
foreground: armored soldier charging with raised sword, starry cape billowing
background: weathered classical stone columns and ruins under bright sky
